prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to local authorities in England and their financial responsibilities associated with the Dedicated Schools Grant (DSG). The guidance and regulations mentioned do not apply to Scotland, which has its own education financing framework and regulations.
